narrative:
Center Township (precinct in Wood County) has 852 registered voters, with 45.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points.
